recommendations.title: The Cat Concerto
recommendations.overview: Tom Cat is a concert pianist who plays beautifully until he is interrupted by Jerry Mouse.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Monster of Mexico
recommendations.overview: A friend of Fred's, Alejo Otero, invites the Scooby gang to Veracruz, Mexico. There they find a monster, El Chupacabra, terrorizing the town.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Legend of the Vampire
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Music, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The Yowie Yahoo starts kidnapping musicians at a concert attended by Scooby and the gang in Vampire Rock, Australia.

recommendations.title: One Piece: Stampede
recommendations.overview: The world's boldest buccaneers set sail for the great Pirate Festival, where the Straw Hats join a mad-dash race to find Gol D. Roger's treasure. There's just one little problem: An old member of Roger's crew has a sinister score to settle.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Loch Ness Monster
recommendations.genres: Family, Adventure, Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: While the gang travel to Scotland to visit Daphne's cousin and witness the annual Highland Games, they find themselves terrorized by the legendary Loch Ness Monster.

recommendations.title: Tom and Jerry: The Fast and the Furry
recommendations.overview: After being evicted from their old house by Tom's owner for causing major damage, cat and mouse Tom and Jerry enter a race entitled the "Fabulous Super Race" to win a mansion.
